name: pantheon-ai/design-principles
summary: Strategic architecture, tactical design, and testable code principles (SOLID, Clean Architecture, Design Patterns, Testable Design)

skills.description: Apply SOLID principles (SRP, OCP, LSP, ISP, DIP) for tactical class design, method extraction, and interface definition
Apply Clean Architecture principles for strategic boundary design, dependency direction, and layered system structure
Select and apply structural design patterns (Strategy, Factory, Adapter, Observer, etc.) to reduce complexity in class design
Design code for testability using boundary isolation, dependency injection, and testable architecture patterns
